name: Broccoli & Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim off fresh stems and cut broccoli into florets about 3 inches long.
2. Steam over boiling water until crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Drain and let dry on paper towels.
3. In a non-stick skillet, stir-fry the broccoli for 3 minutes.
4. Just before serving, toss with pine nuts.
Food Servings per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 106; CHO: 6 mg; CAR: 6 g; PRO: 4 g; SOD: 33 mg; FAT: 8 g
